text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A man identified as Anrup Parasram set himself on fire in Queens, New York, triggering an explosion at a home in that injured seven NYPD officers, a firefighter, and four others. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷☀️🇮🇶🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron paid tribute to the killed French soldiers in Iraq and Lebanon among a group of soldiers. "I am going to tell you how proud I am to be before you today and to say a few words to honor the memory of your brothers…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron stated that under his presidency, France's army has been modernized, adding that it was a necessity. "Our army has been profoundly modernized, like all our armies in recent years. I was able to show you the latest equipment that you touched, which continues to be deployed in accordance with successive military programming laws and the overhaul that is currently being negotiated. It was a necessity, and so the army moves forward, innovates, adopts new equipment, transforms itself, and innovates. I saw it too." @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇫🇷 ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron paid tribute to the killed French soldiers in Iraq and Lebanon among a group of soldiers. "I am going to tell you how proud I am to be before you today and to say a few words to honor the memory of your brothers in arms, Major Frion, Warrant Officer Montorio, and Sergeant Girardin, who died for France, who died in combat in Iraq and Lebanon. In tribute to them, we invite you to observe a minute of silence from now on. Thank you for our dead, for their families." @wfwitness

🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🚢 🎪 📉 TWO TOOTHLESS COALITIONS, ONE STRAIT The Epsteinite regime this week unveiled a new market manipulation scam — the Maritime Freedom Construct (MFC) , a joint State Department/CENTCOM framework " to restore commercial navigation through the strait ." US embassies received a cable — approved by Rubio on April 28 — with instructions to sign up partner governments by May 1. Conveniently synched with Wall Street & oil markets' weekend closing time. The structure is super flexible and vague: countries can contribute through diplomatic backing, intelligence sharing, sanctions enforcement, or naval deployment. No military commitment required. Another strange coincidence — Russia, China, Belarus and Cuba weren't invited. The MFC has no actual enforcement plan. It is an intelligence-sharing and diplomatic pressure framework — a statement of intent in a fancy looking wrapper. The tell is in the timing: Trump declared the Strait " fully open " weeks ago. It wasn't. Iran continues preventing vessels from transiting without paying Tehran's toll, while the US Navy simultaneously runs its own blockade on Iranian ports — from a safe distance, on the outer edge of Iranian anti-ship weapons range, roughly 350 kilometres out. So far, one country has publicly expressed willingness to join: the glorious Baltic behemoth Lithuania . And even that comes with the usual asterisk — they plan to convene a State Defence Council to present the proposal, and the mandate will also require parliamentary approval. So Lithuania is "decisively" considering being in. Maybe. Meanwhile, Macron and Starmer already did the work to form an allegedly "non-US-alligned" coalition. Two weeks ago, on April 17, France and the UK convened 51 countries for an International summit on the Strait of Hormuz at the Élysée Palace , calling for its unconditional, unrestricted, and immediate reopening . Signatories include Germany, Italy, Canada, Australia, South Korea, Bahrain , and most of NATO's EU vassal territories . Then they moved to operational planning. On April 22, Military planners from over 30 nations convened in Perfidious Albion for a conference advancing detailed plans to reopen the strait — including a strictly defensive multinational mission to protect merchant vessels and conduct mine clearance operations , for which four Ukrainian minehunters "currently" (since February 2022) based in Portsmouth are being considered. Yup — the mighty glorious Ukrainian Armada, in the Hormuz. Macron went full "autonomous" and "independent" Little Jupiter on the occasion: "This is a coalition of independent States, separate from the ongoing hostilities." Not Washington's war coalition, explicitly not subject to American direction. The joint statement also included a direct warning against any post-conflict stitch-up: " Signatories oppose any restriction, any agreement regime that would amount to a de-facto attempt to privatize the strait, and obviously any toll system. " The performative Westoid sterile Chihuahua Coalitioning scoreboard: Anglo-French initiative: 51 political signatories, 30+ militaries in operational planning, mine-clearance mandate, next leaders' meeting hosted by the UK. US Maritime Freedom Construct : one Gusano Rubio cable, a May 1 deadline, and mighty Lithuania — pending parliamentary approval. 🐻 Washington is not leading an international response to a crisis it created. It is chasing a coalition that Europe already built, while simultaneously running the blockade that makes the coalition necessary. Iran and the rest of the free world are doing what every sane person would: ignoring it, scripting new Lego animations, and preparing new pre-Wall Street closing time X posts and statements. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 The US‑led Board of Peace has said that since the October ceasefire, food aid in Gaza is reaching three times more people, and Hamas’s theft of aid has dropped from 90% to less than 1%. The board said it is finalising a process for Hamas to decommission its weapons and allow a transition to a new government. It described the current flotilla heading to Gaza as “performative love‑boat activism” and urged those who want to help to use their influence to pressure Hamas to fulfil its obligations. Contributions should go through established humanitarian channels coordinated by the board, the UN and the World Bank, it added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔表示，以色列已成功阻止了试图打破加沙海上封锁的行动，包括昨晚的船队。所有船只都被安全拦截，船队人员被转移……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 美国领导的和平委员会表示，自十月停火以来，加沙的粮食援助覆盖人数增加了两倍，哈马斯对援助物资的盗窃率已从90%降至不足1%。委员会称，正在敲定一项程序，要求哈马斯解除武装并允许过渡到新政府。委员会将目前前往加沙的船队描述为“表演性的爱心船激进主义”，并敦促那些想要提供帮助的人利用自身影响力向哈马斯施压，要求其履行义务。委员会补充说，捐款应通过由委员会、联合国和世界银行协调的既定人道主义渠道进行。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 UN Secretary-General António Guterres has warned that the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will cause lasting pain, including lost jobs, deeper poverty and more hunger. In a best‑case scenario where restrictions are lifted soon, global growth would still drop to 3.1% and inflation climb to 4.4%, he said. If disruption drags on, 32 million people could be pushed into poverty and 45 million more face extreme hunger. A severe scenario through year‑end would see inflation past 6% and growth plummet to 2%, risking a global recession. Guterres called for navigational rights to be restored immediately. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 联合国秘书长古特雷斯警告称，霍尔木兹海峡的封锁将造成持久的痛苦，包括失业、贫困加剧和饥饿增加。他表示，在限制措施很快解除的最理想情况下，全球增长率仍将降至3.1%，通胀率将攀升至4.4%。如果中断持续，3200万人可能陷入贫困，4500万人将面临极端饥饿。如果严重情况持续到年底，通胀率将超过6%，增长率将暴跌至2%，从而引发全球经济衰退。古特雷斯呼吁立即恢复航行权。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇹🇼 Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi spoke with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday, describing leader-level diplomacy as the "guiding star" of China-US relations, ahead of U.S. President Trump's planned visit to Beijing in approximately two weeks. Wang credited the "strategic leadership" of both Xi and Trump for stability in the bilateral relationship and urged the U.S. to make the "right choice" on Taiwan, which he described as the most sensitive issue in China-US relations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇹🇼 中国外交部长王毅周四与美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥通话，在特朗普总统计划于约两周后访问北京之际，将领导人外交描述为中美关系的“指南针”。王毅将习近平和特朗普的“战略引领”归功于双边关系的稳定，并敦促美国在台湾问题上做出“正确选择”，称其为中美关系中最敏感的问题。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Sweden has seized the Russian shadow fleet vessel Caffa and may hand it over to Ukraine. The Caffa is suspected of transporting stolen Ukrainian wheat. The vessel is under Ukrainian sanctions and was sailing under a fake Guinean flag. Most of its crew members are Russian. https://www.aklagare.se/for-media/pressmeddelanden/2026/april/fartyg-utanfor-trelleborg-taget-i-beslag/ tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：瑞典扣押了俄罗斯影子船队船只“Caffa”号，并可能将其移交给乌克兰。Caffa号涉嫌运输被盗的乌克兰小麦。该船受到乌克兰制裁，并悬挂伪造的几内亚旗帜航行。其大部分船员是俄罗斯人。 https://www.aklagare.se/for-media/pressmeddelanden/2026/april/fartyg-utanfor-trelleborg-taget-i-beslag/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @RabbiUkraine : I sent an official letter to Israel’s Minister of Economy and my friend, @NirBarkat , requesting that he review the grain procurement policy. Specifically, I asked that Russia and its grain—some of which may have been stolen from Ukraine—be removed from the list of importers I also emphasized that Israel’s excessive dependence on Russian grain is dangerous from a practical standpoint. When a sector as critical as food security depends on an aggressor state, it creates very serious risks That is precisely why I called for a gradual phase-out of Russian wheat (as I fully understand that Israel, which is also at war and facing a difficult economic situation, cannot do this immediately) and for expanding purchases from strategic partners, primarily the United States of America tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @RabbiUkraine：我向以色列经济部长、我的朋友 @NirBarkat 发送了一封正式信函，请求他审查粮食采购政策。具体而言，我要求将俄罗斯及其粮食（其中一些可能是从乌克兰偷来的）从进口商名单中删除。我还强调，从实际角度来看，以色列对俄罗斯粮食的过度依赖是危险的。当粮食安全这样关键的部门依赖于一个侵略国时，会产生非常严重的风险。正因如此，我呼吁逐步淘汰俄罗斯小麦（因为我完全理解以色列也处于战争状态并面临困难的经济形势，无法立即做到这一点），并扩大从战略伙伴（主要是美国）的采购 推文

text: Nuno Felix This is it. Thats all their is and requires violence Kaja Kallas: Russia does not want to engage in any kind of dialogue. We should not humiliate ourselves by saying, "please, we beg you to talk to us." Instead, we should put them in a position where they move from pretending to negotiate to actually negotiating. https://twitter.com/Gerashchenko_en/status/2049848338963374264/video/1 - Anton Gerashchenko tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：就是这样。这就是全部，并且需要暴力。卡娅·卡拉斯：俄罗斯不想进行任何形式的对话。我们不应该通过说“求求你，我们恳求你和我们谈谈”来羞辱自己。相反，我们应该让他们处于一种从假装谈判转向真正谈判的位置。 https://twitter.com/Gerashchenko_en/status/2049848338963374264/video/1 - 安东·格拉申科 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 AP : A man charged with trying to kill U.S. President Trump at the White House correspondents’ dinner has agreed to remain jailed while awaiting trial. Cole Thomas Allen did not enter a plea during his brief court appearance on Thursday. U.S. Prosecutors allege Allen planned the attack for weeks and tracked Trump’s movements online before rushing the stage at the Washington Hilton on Saturday night while holding a long gun. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美联社：一名被控在白宫记者协会晚宴上试图刺杀美国总统特朗普的男子已同意在候审期间继续被关押。科尔·托马斯·艾伦在周四简短的出庭期间没有进行抗辩。美国检察官称，艾伦策划袭击已数周，并在网上追踪特朗普的行踪，随后于周六晚在华盛顿希尔顿酒店手持长枪冲上舞台。 @wfwitness

text: The victims of the Israeli aggression and war crimes in south Lebanon today. They were killed in the attack on Aadshit al-Qusayr. They from Swaidan family

text: Türkiye delivered the first homegrown T625 GÖKBEY general-purpose/utility helicopter to the Land Forces today, officially starting Army service. — Localization rate over 70%, expected to exceed 80% with the domestic TS1400 engine. — Part of a broader program to deliver 83 helicopters across Turkish institutions 15 for Land Forces. 42 for Interior Ministry (gendarmerie, police, etc.) Resim
text_zh: 土耳其今天向陆军交付了首架国产 T625 GÖKBEY 通用直升机，正式投入军队服役。——国产化率超过 70%，预计随着国产 TS1400 发动机的投入使用将超过 80%。——这是向土耳其各机构交付 83 架直升机计划的一部分，其中 15 架交付给陆军，42 架交付给内政部（宪兵、警察等）。Resim

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels to Israeli vessels, he stated. Sa'ar added that in coordination with the Greek government, those involved will be disembarked in Greece in the coming hours. Israel thanked Greece for its willingness to receive them. Sa'ar called on anyone wishing to provide humanitarian aid to Gaza to use official channels, adding that Israel will not allow the naval blockade to be breached. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa'ar）表示，以色列已成功阻止了打破加沙海上封锁的企图，包括昨晚的船队。他表示，所有船只已被安全拦截，参与者已从船队船只转移到以色列船只上。萨尔补充说，在与希腊政府协调下，相关人员将在未来几小时内于希腊下船。以色列感谢希腊愿意接收他们。萨尔呼吁任何希望向加沙提供人道主义援助的人通过官方渠道进行，并补充说以色列不会允许海上封锁被突破。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ New event An Israeli soldier was seriously wounded and another moderately wounded after a Hezbullah IED detonated in Ainatha. This could have been planted from before and not recent.
text_zh: ❗️ 新事件：一名以色列士兵在艾纳塔（Ainatha）被真主党简易爆炸装置炸伤，伤势严重，另一名士兵中度受伤。这可能是之前埋设的，而非近期所为。

text: 📝 Продвижение к Сумам 📝 Российские войска смогли продвинуться на Сумском направлении , развивая успех под недавно освобожденной Малой Корчаковкой . Соседняя Корчаковка перешла под контроль ВС РФ по итогам нескольких недель боев, о чем заявили в Минобороны. ➡️ Это означает выход к краю внушительного лесного массива между Хотенью и Могрицей , и по мере укрепления позиций в обоих Корчаковках российские подразделения смогут значительно расширить зону действия малых групп южнее, на подступах к Сумам , что неминуемо скажется на оборонительных возможностях противника к северу от областного центра. ➡️ В пользу этого говорит приближение ВС РФ к к оврагам, ведущим в населенный пункт Новая Сечь . С расширением клина к лесу, имеющему тактическое значение, подразделения ВС РФ смогут нарастить усилия на участке. ❗️ В этом лесном массиве украинскими формированиями были оборудованы позиции еще во время вторжения в Суджанский район , аи по опыту других направлений – в современных условиях через укрепления порой наступать проще, чем в чистом поле. ➡️ Значительные успехи есть и на восточном фланге. Российским штурмовикам удалось зачистить несколько крупных лесополос и оврагов к востоку от Мирополья , а также надежно закрепиться в центре этого населенного пункта. Порядка половины застройки представляет собой серую зону, а половину уже вполне уверенно контролируют российские бойцы. 📌 Противник не оставляет попыток контратаковать как на недавно утраченных территориях, так и на более спокойных к текущему моменту участках приграничной территории. А потому с учетом динамики развития событий ожесточения боев на Сумском направлении будет только расти, особенно с учетом появления листвы. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Россия #Сумы #Украина ⭐️ @rybar совместно с @warriorofnorth ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 向苏梅推进 📝 俄罗斯军队在苏梅方向取得进展，扩大了在最近解放的马拉科尔恰科夫卡（Malaya Korchakovka）附近的战果。据俄罗斯国防部称，经过数周战斗，邻近的科尔恰科夫卡（Korchakovka）已处于俄军控制之下。 ➡️ 这意味着俄军已抵达霍滕（Khoten）与莫格里察（Mogrytsa）之间广阔森林地带的边缘。随着在两个科尔恰科夫卡阵地的巩固，俄军小分队将能显著扩大向南的行动区域，直逼苏梅，这将不可避免地影响敌方在州中心以北的防御能力。 ➡️ 俄军向通往新塞奇（Novaya Sech）定居点的沟壑推进，也印证了这一点。随着向具有战术意义的森林楔入点的扩大，俄军部队将能加强该区域的攻势。 ❗️ 在苏贾（Sudzha）地区入侵期间，乌克兰武装部队曾在此森林地带构筑阵地。根据其他战线的经验，在现代条件下，通过防御工事进攻有时比在开阔地带更容易。 ➡️ 东翼也取得了重大进展。俄罗斯突击部队成功清理了米罗波利耶（Miropolye）以东的几片大型林带和沟壑，并在该定居点中心稳固了阵地。约一半的建筑区属于灰色地带，另一半已由俄军稳固控制。 📌 敌方并未放弃在刚失去的领土以及目前相对平静的边境地区进行反击的企图。因此，考虑到事态发展的动态，苏梅方向的战斗激烈程度只会增加，特别是在植被茂盛的情况下。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您部队的战果，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 联系我们。 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版本 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #苏梅 #乌克兰 ⭐️ @rybar 与 @warriorofnorth 联合发布 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 The IOF has confirmed the death of Liam Ben Hamo, a 19-year-old soldier from Herzliya, who was killed near the southern Lebanese border by Hezbollah. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 以色列国防军（IOF）证实，来自赫兹利亚（Herzliya）的19岁士兵利亚姆·本·哈莫（Liam Ben Hamo）在黎巴嫩南部边境附近被真主党杀害。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 转发

text: Nuno Felix Wasn’t their oil infrastructure about to collapse? Reopening the Strait of Hormuz Is Now Job One in the Iran War If the regime doesn’t crack, we could be in a long struggle that will require commitment, patience, and discipline across the US government, write @FDD ⁦@ReuelMGerecht⁩ and CFR Ray Takeyh https://www.wsj.com/opinion/reopening-the-strait-is-now-job-one-in-the-iran-war-96c96314?st=FBaURq - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：他们的石油基础设施不是快要崩溃了吗？重启霍尔木兹海峡现在是伊朗战争的首要任务。如果政权不崩溃，我们可能会陷入一场漫长的斗争，这需要美国政府各部门的承诺、耐心和纪律，@FDD 的 @ReuelMGerecht 和 CFR 的 Ray Takeyh 写道 https://www.wsj.com/opinion/reopening-the-strait-is-now-job-one-in-the-iran-war-96c96314?st=FBaURq - Mark Dubowitz 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines aboard USS New Orleans (LPD 18) stand watch in the Arabian Sea during naval blockade operations against Iran. As of today, 44 commercial vessels have been directed to turn around or return to port. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：美国海军陆战队在“新奥尔良”号两栖船坞登陆舰（LPD 18）上，在阿拉伯海执行针对伊朗的海上封锁行动时进行警戒。截至今日，已有44艘商船被要求掉头或返回港口。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to الإعلام الحربي في المقاومة الإسلامية: "دفاعًا عن لبنان وشعبه، وردًّا على خرق العدوّ الإسرائيليّ لوقف إطلاق النار والاعتداءات التي طالت القرى وهدم البيوت في جنوب لبنان، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة عند السّاعة 10:30 الخميس 30-04-2026 دبّابتي ميركافا في بلدة القنطرة بمحلّقتين انقضاضيّتين وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة." 8th Israeli casualty this month, 4th soldier during the ceasefire. GET OUT OF LEBANON. ❗️ An Israeli soldier was killed and another was moderately wounded in a Hezbullah drone attack in southern Lebanon earlier today The soldier is a recruit from the the Golani Brigade's 13th Battalion, from Herzliya. During the incident, Hezbollah launched two explosive-laden drones at troops stationed in the village of Qantara targeting Israeli tanks. ✍ I know we are paying a toll, but thank God the Israelis are not killing us unharmed
text_zh: ↩️ 回复伊斯兰抵抗运动军事媒体：“为了保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，为了回应以色列敌人违反停火协议以及对黎巴嫩南部村庄的袭击和房屋拆毁，伊斯兰抵抗运动的圣战者于4月30日星期四10:30，在坎塔拉（Qantara）镇用两架自杀式无人机瞄准了两辆梅卡瓦坦克，并取得了确切的命中。” 本月第8名以色列伤亡人员，停火期间第4名士兵。滚出黎巴嫩。 ❗️ 今天早些时候，一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部被真主党无人机袭击身亡，另一名士兵中度受伤。该士兵是来自赫兹利亚的戈拉尼旅第13营的新兵。事件中，真主党向驻扎在坎塔拉村的部队发射了两架装有炸药的无人机，目标是以色列坦克。 ✍ 我知道我们正在付出代价，但感谢上帝，以色列人并没有毫发无损地杀害我们。

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Surveillance camera registered the moment of the strike with a Ukrainian domestic-produced Bulava loitering munition on a mini-bus employed by Russian soldiers parked at a road checkpoint. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049864253113344439/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：监控摄像头记录了乌克兰国产“布拉瓦”（Bulava）巡飞弹击中一辆停在道路检查站的俄罗斯士兵小巴的瞬间。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049864253113344439/video/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Gen. Wesley Clark (Ret.), former NATO Supreme Allied Commander: "U.S. military stockpiles of key systems like THAAD and Patriot interceptors are down to roughly 50% after the Iran war. This inventories on these missiles take several years to replace" 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 前北约欧洲盟军最高司令韦斯利·克拉克（Wesley Clark）将军（退役）：“在伊朗战争后，美国像萨德（THAAD）和爱国者拦截弹等关键系统的军事储备已降至约50%。这些导弹的库存需要几年时间才能补充。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 转发

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Around 10:20 this morning, Hezbollah carried out an explosive drone attack. One drone struck a force from Battalion 13 in the village of Qantara in southern Lebanon, killing one soldier and wounding another moderately. The force was in an open area and suffered a direct hit. The drone was likely of the fibre‑optic type, which the IDF has struggled to intercept in recent weeks. A helicopter evacuated the casualties to hospital. The name of the killed soldier has been released for publication: Sergeant Liem Ben Hamo, 19, from Herzliya, a fighter in Battalion 13 of the Golani Brigade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 今天上午10:20左右，真主党发动了爆炸性无人机袭击。一架无人机击中了黎巴嫩南部坎塔拉村的第13营部队，造成一名士兵死亡，另一名士兵中度受伤。该部队当时处于开阔地带，遭受了直接打击。该无人机很可能是光纤制导型，以色列国防军近几周一直难以拦截。一架直升机将伤员送往医院。阵亡士兵的姓名已公布：19岁，来自赫兹利亚，戈拉尼旅第13营战士，利亚姆·本·哈莫（Liem Ben Hamo）中士。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot has said “the time has come to implement the two‑state solution” and announced that France will host an international conference in Paris on 12 June to give Israeli and Palestinian civil societies a voice. Speaking about the toll of the 7 October attacks and more than two and a half years of war in Gaza, he said France recognised the state of Palestine on 22 September last year and remains committed to a future where both peoples live side by side in peace and security. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗（Jean-Noël Barrot）表示，“实施两国方案的时机已经到来”，并宣布法国将于6月12日在巴黎主办一场国际会议，为以色列和巴勒斯坦民间社会提供发言权。在谈到10月7日袭击事件以及加沙两年半多的战争造成的伤亡时，他表示法国已于去年9月22日承认巴勒斯坦国，并致力于实现两国人民和平与安全共处的未来。 @wfwitness
